correctness.rationale: No code was generated at all. The agent failed to produce any Python code, let alone a working table visualization of S&P 500 data over 5 years. The user's request was completely unmet.

aesthetics.rationale: No PNG was rendered. Without any output, there is nothing to evaluate aesthetically.

code_readability.rationale: No code was provided to evaluate. An empty response offers nothing in terms of code quality or idiomatic great_tables usage.

judgment.summary: Critical failure: the agent produced no output whatsoever. Despite consuming significant tokens and wall-clock time, no Python code was generated and no table visualization was created. The user's request for an S&P 500 overview table was entirely unaddressed.
